_meta.resume_note: Negative result audited against the complete Degree & Certificate Programs table in MiraCosta College's official 2025-2026 catalog.

none_found_sources.locator: Degree & Certificate Programs table, catalog pages 65-70; the complete award inventory omits Economics

notes: No general Economics AA-T, AS-T, AA, or AS appears in the complete 2025-2026 award table. Economics appears separately as a course discipline on catalog page 211, confirming that the subject's presence does not represent an associate award. Liberal Arts: Business and Technology and Social and Behavioral Sciences are umbrella awards and are outside this pass.
